core_skills: Python, Backend Development, Linux, Containers, Docker
skill_match_scores: Python:1.0, Backend Development:1.0, Linux:0.0, Containers:1.0, Docker:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of experience in software engineering or product engineering, Strong proficiency in Python for backend development, Experience working with Linux, containers (Docker, Kubernetes, etc.), and cloud environments, Knowledge of AWS cloud services, Git-based workflows for development, including pull requests and code reviews, Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related quantitative field, or equivalent industry experience
preferred_quals: Experience with Databricks for large-scale data processing, Hands-on experience with Terraform for infrastructure management, Familiarity with GitHub Actions for CI/CD automation, Background in AI/ML technologies and deploying ML models in production
core_responsibilities: Develop and enhance backend features, ensuring system reliability and scalability, Collaborate with stakeholders to define requirements and improve system performance, Manage infrastructure using Terraform and other infrastructure-as-code tools, Work closely with Git-based workflows, including code reviews and contributions, Key Projects: Integrating with LLM Agents and building features around them, Hosting and optimizing ML models to serve millions of requests per day, Processing and managing large-scale data efficiently, ensuring low-latency client access
job_summary: Aura is on a mission to create a safer internet, providing intelligent digital safety products to protect customers against digital threats. The Software Engineer (Backend) will focus on building and maintaining high-performance backend systems, integrating AI-driven components, and managing infrastructure with infrastructure-as-code.
